programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - As it Happens...
programme.desc: Whether the moment demands it or youre intentionally focused, be present.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Texas Southern University
programme.desc: Showcases some of the key Ocean of Soul members, as well as the directors and dancers on the Motion of the Ocean dance team of Texas Southern University.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Alabama AAndM University
programme.desc: A tribute to the distinctive and fascinating culture of Black marching bands - The Halftime Show.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Season 2 in Review: The Inside Story
programme.desc: Reviewing the highs and lows of season two, along with the bands, their style and what makes them unique.

programme.title: What Would You Do for Love?
programme.desc: A fitness trainer who was living paycheck to paycheck decides to keep his new multimillionaire status a secret when he goes on a dating blitz to find true love in 30 days or less.

programme.title: The First Class
programme.desc: A look at students and educators at Memphis High School reveals the impact of a city reimagining education together.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Jr. Sells His Car
programme.desc: Jr. and Vanessa shock everyone by selling the Impala after they finish restoring it; Franklin asks Michael how he can act more like a normal kid.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Anniversary Present
programme.desc: Michael and Jay try to hide their disappointment with their anniversary gifts; Claire hopes to prepare a gourmet dinner for her parents.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Illegal Smile
programme.desc: Michaels unnatural-looking smile lands him in hot water with a traffic-court judge and later with his cellmate (Lou Ferrigno).

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Outbreak Monkey
programme.desc: Flu germs jeopardize Michaels chance to see basketball star LeBron James shoot hoops at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Empty Nest
programme.desc: Michael and Jay look back on the fun times they have had.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Empty Nest
programme.desc: Alone in the house, Michael and Jay reminisce about the fun times they have had with their children and friends.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Calvin Comes to Stay
programme.desc: When Vanessas father, Calvin, is kicked out by his wife and comes to stay with the Kyles, Michael must devise a plan to make him return home.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - One Manns Junk
programme.desc: Lorraine becomes extra nice when she suspects Daniel and Toni are putting her in a retirement home; Daniel and Michael give the Lieutenant some tips before his big date.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Sick Mann
programme.desc: Toni takes things too far when she helps Terri get ready for the school talent show; Daniel milks an injury to be pampered by the family.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Funny Mann
programme.desc: Daniel and Michael go undercover in a comedy club to catch a criminal; Toni runs for the school board and goes against a mean rival.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Dont Kiss and Yell Mann
programme.desc: Daniels female sexual harassment training instructor makes a pass at him; Terri believes DJs new girlfriend isnt good for him.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Working Homegirl
programme.desc: Lovitas (Terri J. Vaughn) feisty great-aunt (guest star Aloma Wright) comes to visit; Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) gives Romeo (Merlin Santana) the hall monitor job. With Steve Harvey, Lori Beth Denberg and William Lee Scott.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Strapped Tease
programme.desc: Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) helps Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric the Entertainer) plan a bachelor party; Bullethead (William Lee Scott) falls for his Internet pen pal. Guest Star: Nikki Cox.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Nightmare on Steves Street
programme.desc: Unnatural events in Steves (Steve Harvey) apartment may keep him from the Funk Cafes grand opening. Guest star: Robin Yvette Allen.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Mouth on Campus
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) declines running for the Teacher of the Year award so Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) can win.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Liar, Liar Your Versaces on Fire
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) test lie-detector bracelets with not-so-good results.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Starting School
programme.desc: Bernie is overwhelmed by the task of getting the children ready for their first day of school; Jordan pretends to be sick, Vanessa refuses to come out of the bathroom and Bryana wants to have her hair braided.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: The pool is being drained and the air conditioner is broken; Bernie takes the children to a water park on the hottest day of the year.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Wandas Week Off
programme.desc: Wanda gets a week of vacation and decides to spend it with the kids.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The King and I
programme.desc: Bernie tries to show the children who is the king of the castle after he realizes everything he says to them goes through Vanessa first.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Jordan goes out for football in hopes of winning a trophy for the Bernie Mac Hall of Fame awards shelf; former Oakland Raiders running back Marcus Allen, MVP of Super Bowl XVIII stars.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Handle Your Business
programme.desc: Bernies weeklong stint on a local radio show leaves his family upset when he uses his private life to get laughs.

programme.title: Saving Westbrook High
programme.desc: Students, their parents and faculty face an uphill battle as they try to prevent their beloved school from closing due to budget cuts.
